title: Lord Brahma assigns lordships to the Deities

analysis.core_story_summary: The Sages requested Sutji to describe how Lord Brahma assigned Lordships to all the deities and the demons. Sutji replied--- The Sun was made the lord of all the planets. Soma was made the lord of all the constellations and medicinal herbs.

audience_notes.children_8_12: Use simple language, explain divine names as characters in a sacred legend.
audience_notes.teens_13_17: Connect events to decision-making, identity, and consequences.
audience_notes.young_adults_18_30: Highlight ethics, leadership, and social relevance.
audience_notes.devotional_traditional: Preserve sacred framing and theological terms respectfully.
audience_notes.global_general: Keep cultural context brief and avoid insider assumptions.

sensitivity_notes: Includes intense mythic elements (curses, demons, destruction).

redesigned_story_by_demographic.children_8_12: **Lord Brahma assigns lordships to the Deities — Kids (8-12):** The Sages requested Sutji to describe how Lord Brahma assigned Lordships to all the deities and the demons. Sutji replied--- The Sun was made the lord of all the planets. Soma was made the lord of all the constellations and medicinal herbs. This story teaches respect for nature. Think of it like a legend that helps us choose kindness, courage, and respect.
